name: payout-signal-refi-isolates-1a
anchor: Controlled A/B vs A14: identical figures + explicit payout signal → R11-B-3 carve-out fires → canonical combined=standalone=56
rationale: A14 (no payout signal) escalates via additive canonical combined (Finding 1b). This fixture ADDS the payout signal + lender match so the carve-out fires (canonical 56). Off-hours staging run isolates Finding 1a: does the LLM ltv_percent still compute additive (103) vs canonical 56? Active-divergence (gate-fix resolves) vs latent-robustness (defense-in-depth).
notes: Single-event. Same numbers as A14 (BMO $380k existing + $460k new / $815k); only the payout signal differs. Requires Bug 1 fix (d749b1e) deployed: gate consumes canonical standalone, so no escalation when canonical=56 even if LLM=103.
